decision_summary: Approve v8.9 as External Runtime Outcome Evidence and Learning Loop, bounded to local outcome and learning evidence.
rationale: The release extends v8.8 reproduction and rollback readiness with audited outcome evidence and learning-loop update evidence while explicitly excluding production provider execution and semantic truth claims.
recommendation: Ship after release-state-audit, focused runtime tests, npm test, organization-verify, smoke, fresh clone verification, and GitHub Actions are green.
expected_user_reaction: The operator should see what changed after the approved/reproduced/rollback-ready provider path and what AOF learned, without mistaking it for production execution.
artifact_change_recommendations: Keep not-proven boundaries visible in release definition and release notes.
organization_change_recommendations: Make operator acceptance and safety drill the next frontier before controlled provider execution.
